update:
Advisory Notifications for users using Google Cloud without an organization is now in  General Availability . 
Advisory Notifications now lets users  opt in to or out of optional notification types .

Advisory Notifications now sends mandatory security and privacy notifications for users using Google Cloud without an organization.  This feature is available in  Preview .  For a list of notification types, see  Types of notifications .
Advisory Notifications lets you opt in to or out of optional notification types. For more information, see  Opt in to or out of notifications .
Advisory Notifications is now  generally available . For information about getting started with Advisory Notifications, see  Viewing notifications .
Advisory Notifications is available in the  Preview  stage. For information about the product, see  Overview of Advisory Notifications .
